title: Add type check to prevent C++ error: assigning to 'IData'  from incompatible type VlQueue

features.name: queue find_index with class object property comparison
features.description: Code should include a queue of class objects with find_index called in a with clause that accesses a property of class objects for comparison

features.name: queue of class objects accessed via VlClassRef
features.description: Code should include a queue containing class objects where the queue elements are accessed through VlClassRef wrapper and find_index is invoked on the queue

features.name: find_index result assigned to scalar int variable
features.description: Code should include find_index method called on a queue of class objects with the result assigned to a scalar int variable
